name: TongaLang
summary: An interpreted programming language designed to make programming concepts accessible through Tonga.
problem: Most programming languages begin in English, creating an extra barrier for new developers who think and learn in other languages.
contribution: Designed and implemented the language as a final-year computer science project.

name: SERC Mini OS
summary: A compact operating-system project built to explore systems programming from the ground up.
problem: Operating-system concepts can feel abstract without a small system that exposes how the pieces work together.
contribution: Built a focused systems project in C to explore low-level software concepts.

name: LifeHarmonyTracker
summary: A personal tracking project focused on bringing everyday routines and reflection into one useful interface.
problem: Keeping track of different parts of daily life often means switching between disconnected tools.
contribution: Created the product concept and developed the JavaScript application.

name: ZamTrivia
summary: An Android quiz experience covering Zambian geography, history, culture, sport and more.
problem: Local knowledge deserves engaging digital experiences that are relevant to Zambian learners and players.
contribution: Built the Kotlin Android application and structured its Zambia-focused quiz content.
